category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a high-performance data structure server for key/value workloads; valkey.io docs describe an in-memory data structure store.
display_name_sources: valkey.io documentation and GitHub repository use the project name Valkey.
docs_sources: valkey.io/docs is the official documentation index with command reference and topic documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: valkey.io introduction describes database, cache, message broker, streams, and in-memory data structures; source_facts.executables list server and CLI tools.
